result: If I could change the world in one way, I would make empathy universal—woven into every thought and interaction. With empathy at the core, understanding and compassion would shape decisions, dissolve many conflicts, and inspire cooperation across cultures, beliefs, and boundaries. The world would become gentler, more just, and more creative, because every voice would truly matter.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
